rationale: The skill's primary action is invoking `swift run` on a bundled Swift package that mutates an `.xcodeproj`/`.pbxproj` and links resources like `GoogleService-Info.plist`, so it reads and writes project files plus the skill's script directory. It explicitly runs `swift --version` and `swift run`, which fetches SPM dependencies (e.g., Firebase, Alamofire) from GitHub, implying network access to github.com and related code-hosting hosts. It also documents `xcode-select --install` as a fallback, and writing new Swift source files is part of the modern folder-sync workflow. No deletions are described.
